input.code:
# Load required libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

W <- Sys.getenv('WORK_DIR')
D <- Sys.getenv('DATA_DIR')

# Load counts and metadata
counts_df <- read.csv(file.path(W, 'counts_de.csv'), row.names=1)
metadata_df <- read.csv(file.path(W, 'metadata_de.csv'), row.names=1)

cat("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts_df), "genes ×", ncol(counts_df), "cells\n")
cat("Metadata:\n")
print(table(metadata_df$cell_type))

# Convert to integer (DESeq2 requires integer counts)
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(counts_df)
counts_matrix <- apply(counts_matrix, 2, as.integer)
rownames(counts_matrix) <- rownames(counts_df)

cat("\nCounts matrix type:", typeof(counts_matrix[1,1]), "\n")
cat("Counts range:", min(counts_matrix), "to", max(counts_matrix), "\n")

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts_matrix,
                               colData = metadata_df,
                               design = ~ cell_type)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created:\n")
print(dds)
